title: astragalus borraginaceus
intro: Astragalus borraginaceus, also known as milk vetch or Mongolian milk vetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of China, Mongolia, and Russia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of astragalus borraginaceus include enhanced immune function, reduced fatigue, and improved cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its roots are used in herbal supplements to promote overall well-being.
